abbreviations.definition: decrease (single crochet 2 together or invisible decrease)
increase (2 single crochet in one stitch)

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work six single crochets into it.

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.summary: Alternate single crochet and increase three times.

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Round 4
rounds.summary: Work two single crochets then an increase, repeated three times.

rounds.title: Round 5
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around.

rounds.title: Round 6
rounds.rawInstruction: sc (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form first ear, sc 3 (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form second ear, sc 6 (both loops). (18)
rounds.summary: Single crochet, work an ear in front loops, sc 3, work a second ear in front loops, sc 6.

rounds.title: Round 7
rounds.rawInstruction: sc (both loops), bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 3 (both loops), bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 6 (both loops). (12)
rounds.summary: Single crochet, bend ear forward and sc in back loop of round 5, sc 3, bend second ear forward and sc in back loop of round 5, sc 6.

rounds.title: Round 8
rounds.summary: Alternate single crochet and increase six times.

rounds.title: Rounds 9-10
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rounds.

rounds.title: Round 11
rounds.summary: Work five single crochets then an increase, repeated three times.

rounds.title: Rounds 12-13
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for two rounds.

rounds.title: Round 14
rounds.summary: Work six single crochets then an increase, repeated four times.

rounds.title: Rounds 15-17
rounds.summary: Work a single crochet in every stitch around, for three rounds.

rounds.title: Round 18
rounds.summary: Work two single crochets then a decrease, repeated six times.

rounds.title: Round 19
rounds.summary: Alternate single crochet and decrease six times.

rounds.title: Add catnip and stuffing
rounds.summary: Add dried catnip and polyester fiber fill stuffing to the mouse body.

rounds.title: Round 20
rounds.rawInstruction: dec 3, ch 15, starting in 2nd ch from hook sc across chs, dec 3. (20)
rounds.summary: Decrease three times, chain 15, work single crochets back along the chain, decrease three times.

rounds.title: Finish off and sew closed
rounds.summary: Finish off the yarn and sew the opening closed.

materials: Worsted/aran (#4) weight yarn in your choice of color
